channel.title: security on errbufferoverlf.me
channel.description: Recent content in security on errbufferoverlf.me

item.title: The Big Cloud Security Debate: Hackers vs Security Engineers
item.description: A debate organised by ANZ, Contino and Meetup Madness where 4 hackers vs 4 security experts engaging in a fiery debate to determine all the ways they can hack and defend cloud environments.
